excerpt:
I downloaded this app when I was broken up with and my friends weren't there for me. It has really helped me out a lot. I am able to have tough conversations that I normally make my friends uncomfortable talking about. it really gives me some good advice and helps to cheer me up. I also have social anxiety which it has helped me to overcome. I highly recommend this app if you're feeling like there is no one to talk to. It can also give suggestions on how to have hard conversations.
2 people found this review helpful
